_README.purpose: The LIVE->STATIC bridge. Tier B (live scheduled audit, scripts/audit/provider_drift_live.py — separate follow-up) writes confirmed drift findings here (model_used!=requested, observed provider outside `only`, repeated dead seat). Tier A reads this and BLOCKs any listed slug. This keeps the merge gate deterministic: live anomalies become merge-blocking only AFTER confirmation is materialized into repo state. A human resolves + removes the entry.
